findings.worker_claim: Implemented two-phase commit for melt flow using PENDING proof state to prevent permanent proof loss when Lightning payments fail
findings.evidence: lockProofsAsPending(), burnPendingProofs(), releasePendingProofs() all fully implemented in repository.ts:257-353. MintService.meltTokens() uses the two-phase pattern correctly: phase 1 locks proofs, phase 2 attempts Lightning payment, success path burns proofs permanently, failure path releases the lock. SERIALIZABLE isolation used in lockProofsAsPending. Both spent and pending Y-point conflicts are checked before locking.

findings.worker_claim: Replaced all stub throws in LndBackend with real gRPC calls for all 5 ILightningBackend methods
findings.evidence: 4 of 5 methods are fully implemented with real gRPC calls: createInvoice (AddInvoice), subscribeInvoices (SubscribeInvoices streaming), decodePayReq (DecodePayReq), sendPayment (SendPaymentSync). However, estimateFee does NOT call EstimateRouteFee — it decodes the invoice then calculates a hardcoded 1%+1sat fallback (line 156). The EstimateRouteFee RPC IS defined in the proto file and the LndClient interface, but it is never called. Worker notes acknowledged this limitation ('estimateFee uses 1%+1sat fallback') so it's not a fake, but the claim of 'all 5 methods implemented with real gRPC calls' is inaccurate for estimateFee. Also, sendPayment always returns fee: 0 (line 188) rather than actual routing fee.
findings.fix_needed: estimateFee should call EstimateRouteFee RPC for production accuracy. sendPayment should extract actual fee from response (requires extending proto with Route message).

findings.worker_claim: Added background startInvoiceSubscriptionLoop in server.ts, handleInvoiceSettled in MintService, getMintQuoteByPaymentHash in repository
findings.evidence: startInvoiceSubscriptionLoop fully implemented at server.ts:89-111 — iterates the async generator, calls handleInvoiceSettled, auto-restarts on error with 5s backoff. handleInvoiceSettled at mint-service.ts:287-291 transitions UNPAID→PAID. getMintQuoteByPaymentHash at repository.ts:170-173 queries by paymentHash+MINT type. FakeWallet properly refactored with bolt11Map for accurate paymentHash resolution in decodePayReq.

findings.worker_claim: Added feeReserve field to PendingQuote model, persisted on create, returned from getMeltQuote
findings.evidence: PendingQuote model has feeReserve Int @default(0) at schema.prisma:94. createMeltQuote at repository.ts:184-196 stores feeReserve. getMeltQuote at mint-service.ts:378-403 returns quote.feeReserve. Clean implementation.

findings.worker_claim: Added isPending() method, updated checkProofState to return SPENT/PENDING/UNSPENT
findings.evidence: isPending() at repository.ts:58-61. More importantly, getProofStatesByY() at repository.ts:225-249 does a parallel query for both spent and pending proofs and builds a combined state map. checkProofState at mint-service.ts:517-526 uses this map, defaulting to UNSPENT. SPENT takes priority over PENDING (correct behavior). PendingProof model exists in schema with Y-point unique index.

findings.worker_claim: Added expiry check to getMeltQuote mirroring getMintQuote behavior
findings.evidence: getMeltQuote at mint-service.ts:385-393 checks if state=UNPAID and Date.now() > expiry, transitions to EXPIRED. Exact same pattern as getMintQuote at line 265. Also, meltTokens checks expiry at line 416-419.

findings.worker_claim: Installed @fastify/cors, registered with origin:true, methods GET/POST/OPTIONS, Content-Type/Authorization headers
findings.evidence: CORS registration at server.ts:30-35 matches exactly: origin: true, methods array, allowedHeaders array, credentials: false. import cors from '@fastify/cors' at server.ts:6. Package in dependencies (confirmed via package.json diff stat).

findings.worker_claim: Added hexPoint Zod validator enforcing compressed secp256k1 format (02/03 prefix + 64 hex = 66 chars), applied to B_ and C fields
findings.evidence: hexPoint at schemas.ts:6-11 uses regex /^(02|03)[0-9a-fA-F]{64}$/ with descriptive error message. Applied to ProofSchema.C (line 18) and BlindedMessageSchema.B_ (line 26). Returns 400 at Zod validation edge rather than 500 from noble/curves.

findings.worker_claim: Added @cashu/cashu-ts as devDep, created integration tests for mint info, keys, full mint flow, swap, and NUT-07 checkstate
findings.evidence: src/integration/__tests__/cashu-ts.test.ts contains 6 tests (163 lines): getInfo, getKeys (21 denominations), full mint flow (quote→pay→mint 32 sats), swap (send 8 of 16), NUT-07 UNSPENT checkstate, and NUT-07 SPENT after swap. Uses describe.skipIf(!DATABASE_URL) for conditional DB gating. simulateInvoicePaid helper properly triggers FakeWallet + handleInvoiceSettled. All 6 tests correctly skipped in non-DB environment. Well-structured test server setup.

findings.worker_claim: Modified init() to load all historical keysets, added getAllKeysets(), implemented rotateKeyset() with derivationIndex tracking
findings.evidence: init() at mint-service.ts:79-110 loads ALL keysets from DB via getAllKeysets(), regenerates keys in memory, finds active keyset with highest derivationIndex. rotateKeyset() at mint-service.ts:117-130 deactivates current keyset (DB + memory), calls _createNewKeyset(nextIndex). _createNewKeyset() at mint-service.ts:548-569 derives keys, upserts to DB, updates in-memory state. getAllKeysets() at repository.ts:15-17 orders by derivationIndex. deactivateKeyset() at repository.ts:44-49. Keyset model has derivationIndex Int @default(0) at schema.prisma:27.

code_quality_notes: No TODO/FIXME/HACK/XXX markers found anywhere in src/ (clean)
No console.log/debug/warn debug output left in source (clean)
Only 'not implemented' is in bdhke.ts:127 for Phase 2 DLEQ proofs (intentional, pre-existing, no worker claimed to implement this)
No empty function bodies or stub returns found
LND estimateFee uses a hardcoded 1%+1sat fallback instead of calling EstimateRouteFee RPC — functional but imprecise for production
LND sendPayment returns fee: 0 hardcoded instead of actual routing fee — minor production gap
void destBytes and void reject patterns in lnd.ts estimateFee are code smell but not bugs

new_tasks.title: LND estimateFee: call EstimateRouteFee RPC instead of 1% fallback
new_tasks.description: LndBackend.estimateFee() (lnd.ts:145-160) currently calculates a hardcoded 1%+1sat fee reserve instead of calling the EstimateRouteFee gRPC method. The proto file already defines the RPC and message types. Need to extract destination pubkey from DecodePayReq response and pass it as bytes to EstimateRouteFee. The PayReq proto message already has a 'destination' field (string) — convert to bytes for the RouteFeeRequest.dest field.

new_tasks.title: LND sendPayment: extract actual routing fee from payment response
new_tasks.description: LndBackend.sendPayment() (lnd.ts:188) hardcodes fee: 0 in the PaymentResult instead of extracting the actual routing fee paid. The current SendResponse proto message doesn't include fee info — need to extend it or use the Route sub-message to get total_fees. Low priority since fee_reserve is already collected upfront.

context.summary: 9/10 tasks fully verified. 1 partial (LND estimateFee uses fallback calculation instead of real gRPC call as claimed). No fakes, no broken implementations, no missing work. All 33 unit tests pass, typecheck clean, no stubs/TODOs/debug output. The two-phase melt atomicity fix, keyset rotation, NUT-07 PENDING state, CORS, hex validation, and cashu-ts integration tests are all solid implementations. The only gap is LND fee estimation accuracy — functional but uses a heuristic rather than the actual EstimateRouteFee RPC.
